channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe cuts rates for first time in almost three years after US-Iran truce
item.description: via Business News Nigeria #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Business News Nigeria

item.title: China Joins India, Japan, South Korea, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia And More Countries In Asia In Zimbabwe Tourism Surge As Global Travel Demand Rises Across Safari And Heritage Corridors In 2026
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: South Africa Joins Zimbabwe, Kenya, Rwanda, Botswana, Egypt, Tanzania and More in Tourism Boom 2026 as Africa Records Historic Visitor Surge, Safari Route Congestion, Rising Revenues, and Rapid Transformation of Global Travel Patterns
item.description: via Travel And Tour World #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Travel And Tour World

item.title: Authorities say at least 9 dead, 25 hurt after a train and bus collide in Zimbabwe

item.title: Zimbabwe: Building Back Home - the 7 Costly Mistakes Zimbabweans Make When Building From Abroad

item.title: What Is Red Sphere Finance, the CBZ Arm Now Powering ZEEX Receivables? @ZSE_ZW
item.description: Red Sphere Microfinance has just been named the anchor financier of the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange’s new trade-receivables platform on ZEEX. It is a wholly owned CBZ subsidiary, a credit-only microfinance institution licensed since 2019. Here is what it is, what it lends, and what its new role means. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs stars cash in despite World Cup 2026 heartbreak
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs stars secure lucrative deals and bonuses despite World Cup 2026 disappointment after missing international tournament success opportunities missed The post Kaizer Chiefs stars cash in despite World Cup 2026 heartbreak appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe Moves to Regulate Cryptocurrencies in Major Digital Economy Shift
item.description: Zimbabwe Moves to Regulate Cryptocurrencies in Major Digital Economy Shift Zimbabwe has taken a significant step toward formalising the use of cryptocurrencies, introducing a regulatory framework that brings virtual assets under the country’s financial oversight system for the fi via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: IDBZ gets substantive Chief Executive Officer
item.description: Nqobile Bhebhe, The Infrastructure and Development Bank of Zimbabwe (IDBZ) has appointed Mr Willing Zvirevo as its substantive Chief Executive Officer with effect from 1 June following a period in which he served in an acting capacity. Mr Zvirevo has been Acting Chief Executive O via The Sunday News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Sunday News

item.title: Bulawayo property fires surge 8 percent, poor wiring chief culprit
item.description: Fire brigade bemoans changing attitudes of motorists not yielding to emergency cars The post Bulawayo property fires surge 8 percent, poor wiring chief culprit appeared first on Zimbabwe News Now. via Zimbabwean News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwean News

item.title: Currency mismatch drains millions from Zimbabwe’s insurers @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Currency mismatch drains millions from Zimbabwe’s insurers -Newsday Zimbabwe BULAWAYO, June 15 (NewsDay Live) — Zimbabwe’s short-term insurance sector is losing millions of dollars annually as a widening mismatch between ZiG-denominated claim settlements and US dollar-pri via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Pay taxes, churches told @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Pay taxes, churches told -Newsday Zimbabwe KAROI, Jun. 15 (NewsDay Live) — Karoi Town Council has warned religious organisations operating commercial ventures that they will be required to pay rates and other applicable taxes, saying properties used for income-generating via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Chinese Investor Plans Dedicated 50MW Power Station For US$100m Chegutu Cement Plant @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Chinese Investor Plans Dedicated 50MW Power Station For US$100m Chegutu Cement Plant ⋆ Pindula News Chinese-owned cement producer Shuntai Investments plans to build a 50-megawatt thermal power plant to support its US$100 million cement manufacturing project in Chegutu. Sh via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Premier African Minerals mobilises US$1.07 million for Zimbabwe projects
item.description: Premier African Minerals has raised approximately $1.07 million before expenses through a share subscription to fund ongoing optimisation and operational activities at its Zulu Lithium and Tantalum Project in Zimbabwe. The AIM-listed company announced on 11 June that the funding via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)

item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
